title: [lint] Width Warning due to Comparison of String Parameter in Generate Statement

features.name: string parameter comparison in generate if condition
features.description: Code should include a string parameter compared against a string literal within a generate block if condition using equality operator
features.snippet:
parameter string LfsrType = "FIB_XNOR";
generate if (LfsrType == "FIB_XNOR") begin end endgenerate
